definitions: Slender surgical instruments used for exploring a wound or part of the body.
Small, unmanned spacecraft, especially one designed to explore the solar system and transmit data back to Earth.
Devices used to obtain information, especially about a remote or inaccessible object or area.
examples: The government launched several probes into the scandal.
The doctor used probes to examine the injury.
NASA sent new probes to Mars.
Scientific probes gathered data from the deep sea.
